requirement_topic.en: Lithium cell and power bank safety: MS/IEC 62133 basis
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电芯及移动电源安全：MS/IEC 62133基础
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電芯及行動電源安全：MS/IEC 62133基礎

summary.en: For portable lithium cells, battery packs, and power banks, Myanmar importers should prepare safety evidence aligned with Myanmar Standards where adopted and IEC 62133 where requested by MSTRD, buyers, customs, or project owners. Standards are largely voluntary in Myanmar, but some categories may require conformity documentation before import or distribution. Documentation should cover cell supplier traceability, test reports, ratings, markings, instructions, and charger interface assumptions for 230 V, 50 Hz use.
summary.zh: 对便携式锂电芯、电池组和移动电源，缅甸进口商应准备与已采用的缅甸标准及MSTRD、买方、海关或项目业主要求的IEC 62133相匹配的安全证据。缅甸标准大多为自愿性，但部分类别在进口或销售前可能要求合格文件。文件应覆盖电芯供应商追溯、检测报告、额定值、标识、说明书，以及230 V、50 Hz使用条件下的充电接口假设。
summary.zht: 對便攜式鋰電芯、電池組和行動電源，緬甸進口商應準備與已採用的緬甸標準及MSTRD、買方、海關或項目業主要求的IEC 62133相匹配的安全證據。緬甸標準大多為自願性，但部分類別在進口或銷售前可能要求合格文件。文件應覆蓋電芯供應商追溯、檢測報告、額定值、標識、說明書，以及230 V、50 Hz使用條件下的充電接口假設。

standards_or_laws: MS/IEC 62133 series where adopted or requested for portable secondary lithium cells and batteries
MSTRD conformity documentation for regulated or in-scope categories
Myanmar 230 V, 50 Hz supply context for chargers and powered accessories

summary.en: China GB 31241 is the common baseline for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries used in portable electronic equipment. It is useful technical evidence, but it is not automatically an MS/IEC 62133 report and does not replace Myanmar importer-led scope confirmation.
summary.zh: 中国GB 31241是便携式电子设备用便携式密封二次锂电芯和电池的常见基线。它可作为有用的技术证据，但不会自动等同于MS/IEC 62133报告，也不能替代缅甸进口商主导的范围确认。
summary.zht: 中國GB 31241是便攜式電子設備用便攜式密封二次鋰電芯和電池的常見基線。它可作為有用的技術證據，但不會自動等同於MS/IEC 62133報告，也不能替代緬甸進口商主導的範圍確認。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — portable lithium cell and battery safety baseline
CCC certification where applicable to the finished product or battery product category

gap.en: The main gap is standard mapping and report acceptability. Exporters should map GB 31241 clauses to IEC 62133/MS requirements, identify deltas, and ask the Myanmar importer or authority whether an IEC 62133 CB report or local conformity file is expected.
gap.zh: 主要差距是标准映射和报告可接受性。出口商应将GB 31241条款映射到IEC 62133/MS要求，识别差异，并由缅甸进口商或主管机构确认是否需要IEC 62133 CB报告或本地合格文件。
gap.zht: 主要差距是標準映射和報告可接受性。出口商應將GB 31241條款映射到IEC 62133/MS要求，識別差異，並由緬甸進口商或主管機構確認是否需要IEC 62133 CB報告或本地合格文件。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary unless the product category, importer, buyer, project owner, customs, or MSTRD conformity scope makes documentation mandatory.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 31241 evidence is the China baseline; CCC is mandatory only where listed.

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology, Myanmar / MSTRD

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use GB 31241 as the China technical baseline, but prepare an IEC 62133/MS bridge file for Myanmar. Confirm report acceptance before shipment because Myanmar standards can be voluntary in general but documentary in practice for in-scope goods.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 可将GB 31241作为中国技术基线，但应为缅甸准备IEC 62133/MS差异映射文件。发货前确认报告可接受性，因为缅甸标准总体可能为自愿性，但对纳入范围的货物在实践中可能要求文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 可將GB 31241作為中國技術基線，但應為緬甸準備IEC 62133/MS差異映射文件。發貨前確認報告可接受性，因為緬甸標準總體可能為自願性，但對納入範圍的貨物在實踐中可能要求文件。
